calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-095 TPJ agency-routing CORRECTED retest on SD-047: revert the probe partition to 047k's non-folded CONTACT_SET (drop the env_events fold that emptied 047l's eval negative class) + add a probe-partition non-degeneracy guard, and ask whether the routed z_world discriminates world-caused contact on the enriched substrate
items.note: Corrected same-question retest (alphabetic suffix, implementation fix) mandated by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-047l_2026-07-11. supersedes V3-EXQ-047l. 047l FAILed 3/5 non_degenerate:false but was adjudicated NON_CONTRIBUTORY (measurement degeneracy, NOT a substrate_ceiling hit): its probe used is_contact = (ttype in CONTACT_SET) or (env_events>0), and on SD-047's dense per-step dynamics multi_source_n_env_events>0 is true ~every step, so the no-contact negative class was EMPTY in all 8 cells (n_contact==n_probe) -> contact_recall_world structurally pinned at 0.0 in BOTH arms -> the MECH-095 comparator was never exercised. THREE fixes (047l->047m): (1) KEEP the env_events fold in the TRAINING is_world routing label (necessary for ROUTED!=BASELINE on SD-047); (2) REVERT the PROBE is_contact to 047k's non-folded CONTACT_SET (drop `or env_events>0`); (3) ADD a probe-partition non-degeneracy guard. GUARD-FLOOR DECISION (user, 2026-07-11): the autopsy estimated a floor of ~20, but direct measurement (uniform-random policy = the probe's policy, 4 seeds x 20ep x 200steps) shows hazard_approach (proximity) saturates ~91% of steps on BOTH the thin 047k env and SD-047, so 047k's OWN PASSing negative class was only ~6-28 samples/seed (min ~6) and SD-047 gives n_no_contact ~5-16/seed. A floor of 20 would veto the exact regime the retest reproduces (047k recall 0.796 ran at n_no_contact~6). So PROBE_NEG_FLOOR=5 is BLOCKING (below it the balanced probe cannot run -> self-route non_contributory via non_degenerate:false, the real 047l failure mode), and PROBE_NEG_BALANCED_TARGET=20 is ADVISORY (probe runs but imbalanced -> non-blocking WARN in the manifest, does NOT set non_contributory). Also reports the secondary claim-orthogonal action-dissociation collapse for BOTH arms (047l: BASELINE +0.10..+0.23 -> ROUTED ~0). claim_ids=[MECH-095]; experiment_purpose=evidence. PASS re-gates MECH-095 promotion out of candidate; a well-posed FAIL routes /failure-autopsy; a degenerate-partition run self-routes non_contributory. MECH-095 stays candidate/substrate_ceiling/pending_retest_after_substrate; n_ceiling_hits stays 0 until a valid ceiling test runs. RE-DERIVE BRAKE: not fired (1 prior MECH-095 non_contributory autopsy = 047l < threshold 2). NOTE per autopsy Sec.7: if 047m ALSO returns non_contributory, that implicates the operationalisation itself (2nd read) -> route MECH-095 to substrate/test-bed work, do NOT queue a third 047 letter. Mint N/A: faithful 047k-structure port emits per_seed lists (no arm_results/arm_cell cells, outside the reuse-fingerprint infra; validator 0 arm-fingerprint-backlog). Ethics preflight all-false/allow (probe; no self-model / negative-valence drive). validate_experiments --strict --paths OK (exit 0); dry-run smoke end-to-end OK (SD-047 active env_ev_ticks~28-33, ROUTED route_loss active vs BASELINE zero, progress boundaries+verdict lines correct, degeneracy guard correctly fires on the untrained 3-ep dry latents, dry manifest relocated out of evidence/). Full-run partition sizes empirically confirmed >= floor 5 (n_no_contact 5-16), so the probe will validly run. Lettered successor to the 047i/047j/047k/047l MECH-095 routing sub-lineage.

items.title: MECH-302 relief-completion discriminative pair (517c sentinel-emit fix)
items.note: Instrumentation-only re-queue of V3-EXQ-517c, which ran to completion (~105 min, exit 0) on 2026-05-30 but emitted NO runner sentinel (never called emit_outcome), so the runner discarded the finished run as a no-result ERROR. 517c's driving loop already uses the current substrate API (generate_trajectories + select_action(candidates, ticks)) and re-runs today (smoke-passed 2026-07-11). Sole change vs 517c: import + call experiment_protocol.emit_outcome(outcome, manifest_path, run_id, dry_run) so the PASS/FAIL verdict registers. Comparator, SD-022 scheduled-injection curriculum, and acceptance criteria (C1 ARM_A events>=3/seed, C2 ARM_A writes>=2/seed, C3 ARM_B events==0, C4 ARM_B writes==0; 2/3 seed pass fraction) byte-identical to 517c. claim_ids=[MECH-302]; a contributory PASS clears the MECH-302 v3_pending gate.

items.title: Curriculum competence-recovery diagnostic (Track-1c): does a two-stage easy->hard curriculum clear the 1.0 foraging floor where flat P1-long (724 A1/A4) did not, or is transfer/capacity the true ceiling
items.note: Track-1c of the post-724 competence-recovery campaign (conversion_ceiling_campaign:CAMPAIGN). diagnostic; claim_ids=[]; non_contributory; PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING. Two-stage CURRICULUM training: Stage-A train the all-ON stack (714 ARM_ON via 724 A0 recipe) to forage an EASY env, then Stage-B fine-tune into the hard 724 env. Arms at MATCHED 300ep total P1: A0 flat-hard control (==724 A1), C1 curriculum e2-frozen-in-StageB, C2 curriculum e2-unfrozen-in-StageB, C3 3-rung easy->med->hard. Load-bearing DV: HARD-env P2 mean_resources_per_episode vs 1.0 floor; Stage-A EASY foraging is the load-bearing PREMISE (same statistic/floor). Self-route (HYPOTHESIS): both oracles clear + a curriculum arm forages easy AND clears hard while A0 does not -> competence_curriculum_buildable (route /implement-substrate staged regime); premise met but no arm clears hard -> transfer_capacity_ceiling; premise/oracle/A0 fail -> substrate_not_ready_requeue. BRAKE-EXEMPT (competence/curriculum diagnostic, not a conversion/de-commit falsifier; claim_ids=[] zeroes the re-derive brake). OBS-DIM PARITY: easy/med rungs keep reef structural channels ON (world_obs_dim=275 == hard) but neutralize difficulty, so the transferred agent's fixed-width encoder spans all rungs (guarded at runtime). ID moved 734->736: 734/735 were taken by sibling Tracks 1a (env-difficulty sweep) / 1b (drive-balance) between design and queue; Track-1a had not produced results, so the easy config was chosen independently and is validated by the Stage-A readiness gate. Route result to /failure-autopsy before any governance action.
